csdb 2026.5.13
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog
    • cs9 — project framework
    • csalert — surveillance alerts
    • csdata — structural data
    • csdb — database access
    • csmaps — maps of Norway
    • csstyle — output styling
    • cstidy — tidy surveillance data
    • cstime — weeks & dates
    • csutil — shared utilities
    • Package registry

Package index

Core Database Classes

Main R6 classes for database connection and table management

DBConnection_v9
R6 Class representing a database connection
DBTable_v9
R6 Class representing a database table with advanced data management capabilities

Database Utilities

Helper functions for database operations and metadata

get_table_names_and_info()
Get table names, number of rows, and size information
csdb_set_auth_hook()
Set authentication hook for database connections
csdb_get_auth_hook()
Get the current authentication hook

Data Validation

Functions for validating field types and data contents

validator_field_types_blank()
Blank field types validator
validator_field_types_csfmt_rts_data_v1()
Field types validator for csfmt_rts_data_v1 schema
validator_field_types_csfmt_rts_data_v2()
Field types validator for csfmt_rts_data_v2 schema
validator_field_contents_blank()
Blank data contents validator
validator_field_contents_csfmt_rts_data_v1()
Field contents validator for csfmt_rts_data_v1 schema
validator_field_contents_csfmt_rts_data_v2()
Field contents validator for csfmt_rts_data_v2 schema

Datasets

Example datasets included with the package

nor_covid19_cases_by_time_location
Covid-19 data for PCR-confirmed cases in Norway (nation and county)

On this page

Crafted by Richard Aubrey White, August Sørli Mathisen.
